purpose: Trigger one explicit user action with a visible priority.
primary_user_task: Submit a completed form and receive clear feedback.

source_of_truth.location: Figma library for visual anatomy; packages/ui/Button.tsx for behavior
source_of_truth.change_process: Design and code changes require one shared review and a migration note.

evidence.notes: Primary and secondary variants include default, hover, disabled, and loading.
Primary and secondary variants exist; no loading API is implemented.
Keyboard activation passes; focus-visible styling is not asserted.

anatomy.name: spinner
anatomy.role: Indicates pending submission without removing the action name.

variants.name: primary
variants.purpose: Highest-priority action in the current decision group.

states.name: default
states.accessibility: Native button role and accessible name come from the label.

states.name: focus-visible
states.visual: The browser outline is reset and no replacement is visible.
states.accessibility: Keyboard focus location is not visible.

states.name: loading
states.visual: A spinner is documented in design.
states.behavior: The code API and duplicate-submission behavior are undefined.

states.name: selected
states.behavior: Use a toggle button or selection control instead.

responsive_behavior.change: The primary action may fill the container width.
responsive_behavior.preserved_information: Label, priority, focus, pending status, and error recovery remain available.

content_rules.rule: Use an action-specific verb phrase and keep the accessible name while loading.
content_rules.reason: The user must understand the action before and during submission.

accessibility.evidence: Rendered button exposes its text label and native role.
Enter and Space activate the button, but focus is not visibly indicated.

parity.evidence: Design includes loading; code does not.
No behavior contract for pending submission.
Loading API and focus-visible treatment are missing.
Live product usage was outside this audit.

findings.problem: Keyboard focus is not visibly indicated.
findings.impact: Keyboard users can lose their position and action context.
findings.smallest_change: Map the project focus token to :focus-visible without removing native fallback behavior.
findings.verification: Keyboard through representative button groups at normal and high zoom.

findings.problem: Design documents a pending state that code cannot express.
findings.impact: Products implement inconsistent duplicate-submission and status behavior.
findings.smallest_change: Define a loading API, retained label, disabled-action policy, and status announcement.
findings.verification: Component tests plus keyboard and screen-reader review.

unknowns: Narrow-container behavior has not been rendered.
Live product overrides were not inspected.
